title: Azure Learning Roadmap
description: A complete, staged path from beginner to expert — cloud foundations, accounts and subscriptions, Microsoft Entra ID, governance, compute, containers and Kubernetes, storage, networking, databases, application integration, security, monitoring, infrastructure as code and DevOps, data and analytics, AI and machine learning, web and mobile, IoT, migration and hybrid, cost management, well-architected design, advanced resiliency topics and certifications.

stages.title: Cloud Computing Foundations
stages.summary: What cloud computing is and how Azure is structured globally.

nodes.title: Cloud Computing Concepts
nodes.description: Cloud models, service types, benefits and economics.

nodes.title: Azure Global Infrastructure
nodes.description: Regions, region pairs, availability zones and geographies.

nodes.title: Azure Architecture & Services Overview
nodes.description: Service categories, resource hierarchy and shared responsibility.

stages.summary: Accounts, subscriptions, management tools, billing and support.
